## UX notes

- Screens, states, responsive behavior, and accessibility notes:

## Data/rules/content impact

- [ ] No rules, data, or bundled content changes.
- [ ] Data model or persistence changes are needed.
- [ ] Rules-helper behavior is affected.
- [ ] Bundled content is affected and needs provenance/licensing notes.
- [ ] User-authored content is affected and remains separate from bundled app content.

## Testing/build notes

- [ ] Add or update unit tests where practical.
- [ ] Run `npm run build` or document why it is skipped.
- [ ] Run `npm test -- --watch=false` or `npm run test:ci` when configured, or document why it is skipped.
- [ ] Run lint/format checks if configured.
- [ ] Check desktop and mobile widths if UI changes.

## Content/licensing checklist

- [ ] Do not add unapproved official Ironsworn prose, move text, oracle text, asset text, art, icons, copied layout, screenshots, or trade dress.
- [ ] Public MVP work blocks unapproved official rulebook prose.
- [ ] Prefer original app helper text.
- [ ] Include source, license, attribution, and provenance metadata for bundled content when applicable.

## Label guidance

Use project labels later if available, such as `feature`, `ui`, `content`, `licensing`, or milestone labels.
